questions.text: What does a win rate of 75% indicate in an AlpacaEval tournament match containing 100 evaluations?
options: The candidate model defeated the baseline in 75 matches (assuming no ties).
The candidate model was faster by 75%.
questions.correct_answer: The candidate model defeated the baseline in 75 matches (assuming no ties).
questions.explanation: AlpacaEval uses a pairwise comparison matrix to evaluate performance. A 75% win rate indicates that the candidate model was preferred in 75 out of 100 matches.
